title: Gamescom 2026: Opening Night Live
description: The global kickoff showcase for Gamescom. Hosted by Geoff Keighley, this livestream features major AAA game reveals and trailers worldwide.

title: BlizzCon 2026
description: Blizzard Entertainment's premier in-person convention. Historically features major announcements for World of Warcraft, Diablo, Overwatch, and Hearthstone.

title: Nintendo Direct (September 2026)
description: Based on historical scheduling patterns (Week 2-3 of September), this is the highly anticipated Q3 Nintendo Direct broadcast prediction window.

title: Steam Summer Sale 2026
description: Valve's massive mid-year PC gaming discount event. Typically launches at 10:00 AM Pacific Time.

title: League of Legends Worlds 2026 Grand Final
description: The culminating championship match for League of Legends esports, taking place in New York City.
